## Description
<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation only

## Security checklist
<!-- Required for any change touching uma/retrieve, uma/common,
     uma/runtime, uma/memory, or .github -->
- [ ] No new external network calls introduced
- [ ] No changes to trust scoring or injection scan logic
      without explicit justification in this PR description
- [ ] No new dependencies added without pinned version
      and justification
- [ ] Owner scoping invariants preserved (AGENTS.md §1)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or internal paths in
      code or tests

## Tests
- [ ] Tests added or updated for this change
- [ ] Full test suite passes locally (`PYTHONPATH=. pytest -q`)

## CLA
- [ ] I have signed the CLA (or this is my first PR and I will
      sign when the bot comments)
